001package net.okocraft.box.api.event.feature;
002
003import net.okocraft.box.api.event.BoxEvent;
004import net.okocraft.box.api.feature.BoxFeature;
005import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
006
007import java.util.Objects;
008
009/**
010 * A class that represents a {@link BoxFeature} related event.
011 */
012public class FeatureEvent extends BoxEvent {
013
014    private final BoxFeature feature;
015    private final Type type;
016
017    /**
018     * The constructor of a {@link FeatureEvent}.
019     *
020     * @param feature the {@link BoxFeature} of this event
021     * @param type    the type of this event
022     */
023    public FeatureEvent(@NotNull BoxFeature feature, @NotNull Type type) {
024        this.feature = Objects.requireNonNull(feature);
025        this.type = Objects.requireNonNull(type);
026    }
027
028    /**
029     * Gets the {@link BoxFeature} of this event.
030     *
031     * @return the {@link BoxFeature} of this event
032     */
033    public @NotNull BoxFeature getFeature() {
034        return feature;
035    }
036
037    /**
038     * Gets the {@link Type} of this event.
039     *
040     * @return the {@link Type} of this event
041     */
042    public @NotNull Type getType() {
043        return type;
044    }
045
046    @Override
047    public String toString() {
048        return "FeatureEvent{" +
049                "feature=" + feature +
050                ", type=" + type +
051                '}';
052    }
053
054    /**
055     * Types of this event.
056     */
057    public enum Type {
058
059        /**
060         * The feature was registered
061         */
062        REGISTER,
063
064        /**
065         * The feature was unregistered
066         */
067        UNREGISTER,
068
069        /**
070         * The feature was reloaded
071         */
072        RELOAD
073    }
074}
